cancelCoverageOnClose(uint256).notice: Cancels active coverage when position closes without claim.

onPositionClosed(address,bytes32,uint256.notice: Optional hook called when a position closes.

onPositionLiquidated(address,bytes32,uin.notice: Optional hook called when a position is liquidated.

onPositionOpened(address,bytes32,uint256.notice: Optional hook called when a position opens.

processLiquidationClaim(uint256,address,.notice: Processes liquidation claim payout for insured position.

registerCoverage(uint256,(address,bytes3.notice: Registers insurance coverage and reserves vault capacity for a position.
